title: CommitSummaryContract
description: Schema of the Commit Summary Contract generated by the Runtime and consumed by the Bootstrap to generate structured conventional commits.

x-contract-metadata.semantics: Estrutura semântica para gerar uma mensagem de commit convencional (Conventional Commit) baseada no trabalho realizado pelo Runtime.
x-contract-metadata.lifecycle: Nasce no final de uma tarefa aceita que gerou mutações; consumido pelo Bootstrap durante a promoção (git commit) e removido na limpeza.

type.description: Commit type (e.g., feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, chore).

scope.description: The scope of the change (e.g., runtime, bootstrap, ui, config).

subject.description: A short description of the change in imperative mood.

summary.description: Bullet points detailing the specific changes made.

breaking_change.description: Indicates if the change introduces breaking changes.
